response.justification: Strong senior full-stack candidate with 15+ years of experience across web, backend, and embedded systems. Current role at re:cinq involves TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows), directly matching a key requirement. Solid React + TypeScript + MongoDB + AWS background from Optilyz, plus testing/TDD advocacy (workshops, fluent-asserts library) align well with the engineering culture implied. Gaps in explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin experience are notable but bridgeable given depth in adjacent tech.
strengths: AI-agent + MCP experience matches a hard-to-find requirement
Deep full-stack track record with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS
Strong testing/TDD culture: workshops, talks, open-source test tooling
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in stack
Kotlin not mentioned (only Java, and limited recent use)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate niche-tech preference over the JS/TS ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stack
